reference.title: Writing Robust XSLT Customizations
reference.shortdesc: Recommended XSLT patterns for DITA-OT customization: import layers, @class ancestry matching, wrapper overrides, and consistent hooks.

section.title: Recommended patterns
section.p: Even though the full OT pipeline is complex, most real customization work is XSLT. These patterns minimize upgrade pain:

ol.li: Import the default transform — xsl:import the shipped XSL for your target output.
Override templates by @class ancestry — match="*[contains(@class,' topic/p ')]" to work across specializations.
Prefer wrapper overrides — Use xsl:next-match to keep default logic but add wrappers/classes.
Add consistent hooks — classes and data-* attributes for styling and analytics.
